summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MLB Pre-game Analytics Engine (Phase MLB-1). All 9 pure scoring functions tested, signal catalog sport-aware validation verified, and integration endpoint /api/mlb/day working correctly with source_url transparency.

notes: No picks/rescued returned on test date 2025-08-15 (15 games confirmed, all discarded). This is EXPECTED per MVP scope - full enrichment (offense/bullpen/weather data) via Baseball Savant deferred to G2. The contract is met: every discarded entry has pitcher_confirmation_source_url and every signal has source_url embedded.

passed_tests: Auth: Login with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 ✅
Unit: pitcher_quality_score - PITCHER_OVERPERFORMING tag (ERA=2.80, xERA=4.50) ✅
Unit: pitcher_quality_score - PITCHER_UNDERVALUED tag (ERA=4.60, xERA=3.20) ✅
Unit: pitcher_quality_score - Normal pitcher (no regression tags) ✅
Unit: bullpen_fatigue_score - 10+ IP triggers BULLPEN_FATIGUE tag and caps score at 40 ✅
Unit: bullpen_fatigue_score - ERA 7d >= 4.75 triggers BULLPEN_FATIGUE ✅
Unit: bullpen_fatigue_score - Fresh bullpen (no BULLPEN_FATIGUE, score >= 70) ✅
Unit: park_factor_analyzer - Coors Field + 85F + wind 15mph out → PARK_OVER_SIGNAL + HOT_WEATHER_OVER + WIND_OUT_OVER ✅
Unit: park_factor_analyzer - Oracle Park + wind 12mph in → PARK_UNDER_SIGNAL + WIND_IN_UNDER ✅
Unit: park_factor_analyzer - Park multipliers correct (Coors=1.15, Oracle=0.92) ✅
Unit: run_line_predictor - RUN_LINE_TRAP tag when bullpen_era_7d=5.20, ip_48h=10, 1-run-win%=45% ✅
Unit: run_line_predictor - RUN_LINE_TRAP caps score at 45 ✅
Unit: run_line_predictor - No RUN_LINE_TRAP when conditions not met ✅
Unit: over_under_predictor - Elite pitchers (h_q=80, a_q=78) + Oracle (0.92) + line=8.5 → UNDER verdict + UNDER_VALUE tag + score>=85 ✅
Unit: over_under_predictor - Weak pitchers + Coors (1.15) → OVER verdict + OVER_VALUE tag ✅
Unit: nrfi_yrfi_analyzer - Sharp pitchers (first_pitch_strike=0.65, era_1st=2.5) + weak top3 (obp=0.290, slg=0.380) → nrfi_score>50 ✅
Unit: nrfi_yrfi_analyzer - yrfi_score = 100 - nrfi_score + 8 ✅
Unit: mlb_fragility_score - High fragility (BULLPEN_FATIGUE + extreme_weather + low pitcher quality) → score>=60 + label=FRAGIL ✅
Unit: mlb_fragility_score - Empty context → label=MUY_PROTEGIDO ✅
Unit: emit_signals - Returns list of signals with source_url field ✅
Unit: emit_signals - Every signal has source_url = statsapi URL ✅
Unit: emit_signals - All signals have required fields (code, label, severity, category, signal_type) ✅
Signal Catalog: PITCHER_OVERPERFORMING valid for baseball, returns None for football/basketball ✅
Signal Catalog: RUN_LINE_TRAP valid for baseball, returns None for football ✅

Signal Catalog: All 8 new MLB codes (PITCHER_OVERPERFORMING, PITCHER_UNDERVALUED, RUN_LINE_TRAP, STRONG_PITCHER_EDGE, PARK_OVER_SIGNAL, PARK_UNDER_SIGNAL, NRFI_SIGNAL, YRFI_SIGNAL) are BASEBALL_ONLY ✅
Integration: GET /api/mlb/day?date=2025-08-15 returns 200 ✅
Integration: Response has all required fields (date, engine, picks, rescued_picks, discarded_picks, fragility_scores, editorial_context_signals_by_game, pipeline_meta) ✅
Integration: engine = 'mlb_pregame_analytics_v1' ✅
Integration: pipeline_meta.statsapi_url present and starts with https://statsapi.mlb.com ✅
Integration: 15 games confirmed on 2025-08-15 ✅
Integration: All 15 discarded entries have pitcher_confirmation_source_url field = statsapi_url ✅
Integration: editorial_context_signals_by_game structure correct (signal arrays per game_pk) ✅
Integration: All signals in signals_by_game have source_url field ✅
Integration: fragility_scores have correct structure (score + label) ✅
Integration: fragility_scores labels are valid (MUY_PROTEGIDO/PROTEGIDO/RIESGO_MEDIO/FRAGIL) ✅

success_percentage.frontend: N/A (backend only testing per review request)

key_validations: pitcher_quality_score correctly detects PITCHER_OVERPERFORMING when xERA - ERA >= 1.20 and reduces score
pitcher_quality_score correctly detects PITCHER_UNDERVALUED when ERA - xERA >= 1.20 and boosts score
bullpen_fatigue_score correctly caps score at 40 when innings_last_48h >= 10
bullpen_fatigue_score correctly fires BULLPEN_FATIGUE tag when bullpen_era_7d >= 4.75
park_factor_analyzer correctly returns PARK_OVER_SIGNAL for Coors Field + hot weather + wind out
park_factor_analyzer correctly returns PARK_UNDER_SIGNAL for Oracle Park + wind in
run_line_predictor correctly fires RUN_LINE_TRAP tag when favorite_bullpen_era_7d > 4.75 OR favorite_bullpen_ip_48h > 8 OR favorite_one_run_win_pct > 0.40
run_line_predictor correctly caps score at 45 when RUN_LINE_TRAP is triggered
over_under_predictor correctly returns UNDER verdict when dual elite pitchers + pitcher-friendly park
over_under_predictor correctly returns OVER verdict when weak pitchers + hitter-friendly park
nrfi_yrfi_analyzer correctly computes nrfi_score > 50 when sharp pitchers + weak top3 lineup
mlb_fragility_score correctly returns label=FRAGIL when score >= 60
mlb_fragility_score correctly returns label=MUY_PROTEGIDO when context is empty
emit_signals correctly embeds source_url in every signal when source_url is provided
Signal catalog correctly returns None for BASEBALL_ONLY codes when sport is football or basketball
GET /api/mlb/day endpoint correctly returns 200 with all required fields
GET /api/mlb/day endpoint correctly embeds pitcher_confirmation_source_url in every discarded entry
GET /api/mlb/day endpoint correctly embeds source_url in every editorial_context_signal

mlb_stats_api_integration.note: All discarded entries have pitcher_confirmation_source_url field. All signals have source_url field. Transparency requirement fully met.
